governingBody: Texas corrections agencies and prison mailrooms
reasonSummary: The Texas prison-ban record treats the book as excluded reading inside state custody, which shows how prison and mailroom censorship function as a government reading regime. The exported reason says: PGS 54, 68, 74, 75.
note: The Texas prison-ban record treats the book as excluded reading inside state custody, which shows how prison and mailroom censorship function as a government reading regime. The exported reason says: PGS 54, 68, 74, 75 & 126 BRK WPN
